title: Ability to customise the order of the workspace dropdown list on the left hand side
excerpt: Right now the dropdown list for workspaces is displayed  alphabetically with no means to edit the order. I know you can customise the favourites section but that only applies to individual boards rather than entire works…

posts.author: annaarmstrong (Anna)
posts.cookedHtml: Right now the dropdown list for workspaces is displayed alphabetically with no means to edit the order. I know you can customise the favourites section but that only applies to individual boards rather than entire workspaces

posts.author: daniel.trudeau (Daniel Trudeau)
posts.cookedHtml: I also want the ability to hide workspaces that I don’t go to often. If I ever needed, I could search/navigate to them but I go into them maybe once a year or less even. I just want to hit my drop down and see the 4 I really need to see and make navigation quick.
